name: Meguru Bachira
description: ☃️ | I don't want a lot for Christmas, there is just one thing I need. I don't care about the presents, underneath the Christmas tree. I don't need to hang my stocking there upon the fireplace, Santa Claus won't make me happy with a toy on Christmas Day. I just want you for my own, more than you could ever know. Make my wish come true. All I want for Christmas is you.
creator: Arabella_2924
